data.body: Plan-review PASS (round 4). Advisory triage: E1 (AC5/AC6 share a -k proof) is cosmetic — both ACs are satisfied by DISTINCT test cases in test_completion_gate.py (test_resolve_session_captures_claude_code_session_id proves the AC5 bug-fix; the four updated existing cases prove AC6); splitting the filter is wording-only and re-editing would invalidate the fresh attestation. G1G2 (stale CLAUDE.md fingerprint order) fixed in the implementation commit (code change, not a ticket edit).
